title: need some help understanding 222 and 333
wikitext:
[]: [spoilers] need some help understanding 2.22 and 3.33 Post by muffinman123 » Sat Apr 27, 2013 6:17 am had a tons of questions to ask, but not sure which thread to post them. I realized most of the questions had been answered in other threads, but I don't know how to find them. if you could point me to the individual answers to them that would be cool. my opinions are probably mixed in there somewhere among the questions, so I apologize if it's cluttered. how did EVA-1 gain all the adam abilities without s2 engine in 2.22? it overpowered the angel so easily and even used new abilities after it ran out of power, the only thing that powered it at the time was Shinji's fruit of knowledge. anime continuity EVA-1 never gained any new abilities on its own, it just stole another angel's body parts to gain upgrades. is kaworu connected to his alternate universe reincarnations? at the end of 2.22 he said he would give Shinji happiness THIS TIME, seems like he failed the other times which happened in other timelines. it's funny though, he totally failed, Shinji was already happy inside EVA-1 along with Rei and his mom. kaworu screwed up and stopped the 3rd impact, so Shinji would eventually get yanked out of EVA-1 and back into reality that he despised so much. where did old Rei go? is she still stuck in eva-1 along with Shinji's mom? how did EVA-2 get its arms back in 3.33 when it lost both of them in 2.22? evangelions are organic underneath right? are the rebuild-continuity evangelions somehow different from anime version so that their limbs could be fixed with parts? that's how I see eva2+8 could be possible, but still, they were combining flesh together of that scale, even transplant can't do that much. --- how did NERV members who were standing RIGHT THERE at the epicenter of 3rd impact come out unscathed while the rest of the humanity turned into red evangelion corpses? why was Misato such an ass to Shinji in 3.33? at the end of 2.22, Misato shouted to Shinji to chase his own wish and not let other people push him around, and then lol 3.33, put a freaking bomb on his neck for following through with his selfishness. Shinji did what he thought was right. from Shinji's viewpoint, NERV abandoned Asuka when angel emerged from EVA-4. he didn't want to fall as low as the adults; that's why he tried his damn hardest to rescue Rei who he liked. what was the result of EVA-6/12th angel interaction with lilith? she lost her head, and eva-6 had 2 spears put in it, something of such a big scale must have happened for them to need to pierce it with 2 spears. the thing I was so confused about EVA-1's 3rd impact was that NERV members all came out fine, and yet 3.33 showed EVERYONE ELSE turned into EVA corpses . I almost feel EVA-6/12th angel was the cause of end of humanity, not EVA-1's impact that got stopped by kaworu right away. it makes sense to me that way because the walls of central dogma were also filled with red EVA corpses, which seemed like it happened after EVA-6 went down there and messed with lilith. --- EVA-13's 4th impact seemed to have brought all the red statues to orbit and also unearthed a giant building, what is that building? the green EVA's in the 4th movie preview, were they the activated red EVA statues made from humans? there's crap tons of AT field from those green EVA's, the only way there could be that many must mean the reactivation of the red statues. so kaworu called eva-13 infinity, but eva-13 was made from one of the 4 adams. why did he describe the walls of central dogma who look exactly like 3rd impact victims as failures of infinity ? they came from completely different source. remember, there was only 4 adams, there's no way NERV could create a crap load of copies from adams on their own. was kaworu BSing? --- the preview videos always ended up different from the actual movie 2.0 preview had many scenes that were dropped in the actual film, like Misato's fight with ritsuko and the scene where mari wearing old costumes standing there watching giant light crosses (this could be the EVA-4 scene that wasn't shown, or maybe this was 3rd impact when people started to turn?) point was even though a lot of stuff in 2.0 preview didn't make it to the actual film, they were minor things for character development but doesn't affect the continuity. why was 3.0 preview and the actual film so different? someone even said the preview was in fact the gap between 2.0 and 3.0 which made sense to me tbh. I didn't get the tone of 2.22's Rei rescue and tone change in 3.33. evengelion never had that happy music on success of heroes like how happy the scene was when he rescued Rei. it looked great sure, but it's so unexpected when the kids started singing. then in 3.33 there's yet another big tone change that comes with time skip and post-apocalyptic world. 2.22's rescue part already had pretty inconsistent tone, but 3.33 was just so different from 1.11 and 2.22 in terms of pace and development. I wish the time gap explanation could have happaned earlier with flashbacks and kaworu's gay piano parts could get shortened so that 3.33 may connect better with previous movies.

[]: Post by chuj5 » Sat Apr 27, 2013 9:51 am how did NERF members who were standing RIGHT THERE at the epicenter of 3rd impact come out unscathed while the rest of the humanity turned into red evangelion corpses? why was Misato such an ass to Shinji in 3.33? at the end of 2.22, Misato shouted to Shinji to chase his own wish and not let other people push him around, and then lol 3.33, put a freaking bomb on his neck for following through with his selfishness.

[]: Post by kboyrulez12345 » Sat Apr 27, 2013 11:05 am To OP, I can answer a majority of those questions. Some of them are your questions are speculative though. As to how Misato and NERV staff were all right in the end, someone compared it to being in the eye of the storm. When someone is in the middle of a storm, they don't get get hurt. Everywhere outside those though. For why Misato hates Shinji in 3.33. It's not so much as hate. Some people believe it to be a facade because she can't show weakness in front of her men. The thing is, Shinji started the apocalypse in 2.22, which means that because of him countless lives were lost. Family members, friends...ect. Even though Shinji didn't meant to do all those things, it's not surprising for someone to hold a grudge. After all, as humans, we do, a lot of times, make our emotions cloud our judgement. Misato doesn't so much as hate Shinji, so much as hold a grudge. Though, if one were to really pay attention in 3.33, before Misato was about to detonate the bomb, one can see that she hesitated for a few seconds. Meaning she still has a soft spot for Shinji...It's just that she doesn't want to show it due to the circumstances around here. Having to be the leader of people who want to fix the world, no matter what the costs, even sacrificing their own lives to do so. Yes, Rei is still inside Eva Unit 01 with Yui as well. For how Eva-2 get's it arms back, well, it's been 14 years. WILLE most likely had the time to repair it, either that or NERV. As for the how though, since this is Evangelion we're talking about, we'll either get that answer in 4.0, or be hinted at. For the rest of your questions, I'm not sure. I'm downloading Evangelion 3.33 now, I'm going to watch all 3 movies back to back. I can most likely make sense of everything once I do that.

[]: Post by muffinman123 » Sat Apr 27, 2013 2:07 pm kboyrulez12345 wrote: As to how Misato and NERV staff were all right in the end, someone compared it to being in the eye of the storm. When someone is in the middle of a storm, they don't get get hurt. Everywhere outside those though.

[]: Post by qu4d » Sat Apr 27, 2013 2:14 pm It's NERV, not NERF ;)

[]: Post by Giji Shinka » Sat Apr 27, 2013 2:16 pm If we take 3.0 preview seriously: Gendo and Kozo were in the mountains away(And Misato and the others captured and moved away from tokyo-03) from the event that happened in the city: Lilith awoke/Eva-01 awakened again and caused true third impact.

[]: Post by muffinman123 » Sat Apr 27, 2013 2:22 pm Giji Shinka wrote: If we take 3.0 preview seriously, where Gendo and Kozo were in the mountains away(And Misato and the others captured and moved away from tokyo-03) from the event that happened in the city: Lilith awoke/Eva-01 awakened again and caused true third impact.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 28, 2013 8:15 am Locking for the same reason I locked this topic .
